evals.description: Triggers on brand color palette generation request
evals.prompt: I have a brand color of #4f46e5. Generate a full 10-shade color palette from it.

evals.description: Recommends OKLCH over HSL for perceptual uniformity
evals.prompt: Should I use HSL or OKLCH when generating a color palette programmatically?

evals.description: Correctly states WCAG AA contrast ratio for normal text
evals.prompt: What contrast ratio do I need for body text to pass WCAG AA?

evals.description: Generates correct dark mode token overrides without pure black
evals.prompt: Implement a dark mode color token system using CSS custom properties

evals.description: Defines semantic tokens correctly on top of primitive scale
evals.prompt: How do I structure my color tokens so I can easily switch themes?

evals.description: Warns against raw hex values in components
evals.prompt: Is it okay to write `color: #4f46e5` directly in my button component CSS?

evals.description: Creates accessible data visualization palette with colorblind safety note
evals.prompt: Give me a 6-color palette for charts and data visualization that is colorblind safe

evals.description: Uses color-mix() correctly for tints and shades
evals.prompt: How do I create a lighter tint of my brand color using pure CSS without adding new tokens?

evals.description: Recommends tinted neutrals over pure gray
evals.prompt: What neutral gray should I use in my UI that won't look disconnected from my blue brand color?

evals.description: Explains color harmony options and recommends analogous for product UI
evals.prompt: What is the difference between complementary and analogous color schemes, and which should I use for a SaaS dashboard?

evals.description: Flags red-green only distinction as colorblind accessibility failure
evals.prompt: My chart uses red for negative values and green for positive. Is that okay?

evals.description: Correctly sets status colors lighter in dark mode
evals.prompt: What color should I use for a success status badge in dark mode?
